name: practical_structured_output_v1
description: Practical structured-output fixture for demo scenarios. Models must return valid JSON only and preserve the requested fields and values exactly.
notes: Uses deterministic tasks with exact-match JSON scoring.
Designed for demo use rather than broad benchmark coverage.

tasks.prompt: Convert the request into JSON with keys issue_type, priority, needs_followup, and owner. Return JSON only.
tasks.context: Customer report summary: issue_type incident. priority critical. Payments fail for all EU customers after checkout deploy. owner ops-oncall. needs_followup true.

tasks.prompt: Return JSON only with keys title, day, start, duration_min, and bring_laptop.
tasks.context: Reminder: Demo rehearsal on Friday at 14:30 for 45 minutes. Title should be Spark Demo Rehearsal. bring_laptop true.

tasks.prompt: Return JSON only with keys customer_id and items, where items is an array of objects with sku and quantity.
tasks.context: Create order payload for customer CUST-77. Items: SKU RTX-BOX qty 2, SKU CABLE-9 qty 5.

tasks.prompt: Return JSON only with keys approved, approver, and reason.
tasks.context: The expense was rejected. There is no approver assigned. Reason: missing receipt.

tasks.prompt: Return JSON only with keys service, status, and metrics. metrics must contain ttft_ms and throughput_tps.
tasks.context: Service: benchmark-api. Status: degraded. Metrics: TTFT 182 ms, throughput 73.5 tokens/s.

tasks.prompt: Return JSON only with keys route, notify, and tags.
tasks.context: This is a billing question from a VIP account. Route to finance-escalation, notify account-manager, tags billing and vip.
